name: Sriraam Natarajan
title: Professor, Director of Center for Machine Learning
bio: AAAI Fellow. Research in statistical relational AI, machine learning for healthcare, and human-allied AI systems. Director of the UTD Machine Learning Center.

name: Vibhav Gogate
title: Professor
bio: Research in probabilistic reasoning, graphical models, and lifted inference. Known for scalable algorithms for probabilistic inference in large Bayesian and Markov networks.

name: Rishabh Iyer
title: Assistant Professor
bio: Research in submodular optimization, machine learning, data selection, and subset selection for efficient training of large models.

name: Anurag Nagar
title: Associate Professor of Instruction
bio: Teaching-focused faculty. Courses in machine learning and statistical methods. Known for thorough coverage of regression, decision trees, and neural networks.

name: Nicholas Ruozzi
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in probabilistic graphical models, approximate inference, and message-passing algorithms.

name: Haim Schweitzer
title: Professor
bio: Research in dimensionality reduction, matrix approximation, and data representations. Known for contributions to PCA, SVD, and feature selection algorithms.

name: Sanda Harabagiu
title: Professor, Research Initiation Chair
bio: Pioneer in question answering, information extraction, and biomedical NLP. Led development of early QA systems for TREC competitions. Research in clinical NLP and semantic understanding.

name: Vincent Ng
title: Professor
bio: Research in coreference resolution, discourse processing, opinion mining, and natural language understanding. NSF CAREER award recipient.

name: Jessica Ouyang
title: Assistant Professor
bio: Research in narrative understanding, summarization, and text generation. Focuses on computational approaches to story understanding and creative language generation.

name: Xinya Du
title: Assistant Professor
bio: Research in information extraction, question generation, event understanding, and large language models. Strong focus on structured NLP tasks.

name: Kevin Hamlen
title: Professor, Louis A. Beecherl Jr. Distinguished Professor
bio: Director of the UTD Cyber Security Research and Education Institute. Research in language-based security, binary analysis, malware defense, and software security enforcement.

name: Bhavani Thuraisingham
title: Louis A. Beecherl Jr. Distinguished Professor, Founders Chair
bio: ACM and IEEE Fellow, NAI Fellow. Pioneering work in data and application security, secure data mining, and cyber security for cloud and IoT systems.

name: Murat Kantarcioglu
title: Professor
bio: IEEE Fellow. Research in privacy-preserving data mining, cryptographic protocols for database security, and blockchain-based data integrity.

name: Yvo Desmedt
title: Jonsson Distinguished Professor
bio: Internationally recognized cryptographer. Research in public-key cryptography, secret sharing, and threshold cryptosystems.

name: Kangkook Jee
title: Assistant Professor
bio: Research in systems security, binary analysis, provenance tracking, and threat detection for enterprise systems.

name: Shuang Hao
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in network security, web security, malware analysis, and measuring cybercrime infrastructure.

name: Neeraj Mittal
title: Professor, Associate CS Department Head
bio: Research in distributed computing, concurrent algorithms, fault tolerance, and program verification for distributed systems.

name: Ravi Prakash
title: Professor
bio: Research in distributed systems, peer-to-peer networks, and fault-tolerant computing.

name: Kamil Sarac
title: Professor, Associate Head for Faculty Affairs
bio: Research in computer networking, network measurement, and Internet topology. Expert in multicast protocols and network management.

name: Jason Jue
title: Professor
bio: Research in optical networks, cloud computing networking, and resource allocation in wireless and wired networks.

name: Ovidiu Daescu
title: Professor, CS Department Head
bio: Research in computational geometry, algorithm design and analysis, and geometric optimization. Numerous papers in SODA, SoCG, and related venues.

name: Ding-Zhu Du
title: Professor
bio: World-renowned combinatorics researcher. Work on Steiner trees, dominating sets, and combinatorial optimization problems in networks.

name: Benjamin Raichel
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in computational geometry, metric embeddings, and algorithm design. NSF CAREER award recipient.

name: Gopal Gupta
title: Professor
bio: Research in logic programming, answer set programming, constraint solving, and programming language theory.

name: Dung T. Huynh
title: Professor
bio: Research in formal language theory, automata, and computational complexity.

name: Balakrishnan Prabhakaran
title: Professor
bio: Editor-in-Chief of IEEE Multimedia. Research in multimedia systems, 3D medical imaging, video analytics, and immersive tele-rehabilitation.

name: Xiaohu Guo
title: Professor
bio: Research in computer graphics, geometric modeling, mesh processing, and physically-based simulation.

name: Yu Xiang
title: Assistant Professor
bio: Director of the Intelligent Robotics and Vision Lab (IRVL). Research in 6D object pose estimation, robot manipulation, and embodied AI.

name: Yapeng Tian
title: Assistant Professor
bio: Research in multimodal learning, audio-visual understanding, and video analysis with deep learning.

name: Jin Ryong Kim
title: Assistant Professor
bio: Director of the Multimodal Interaction Lab (MI Lab). Research in haptic technology, thermal interfaces, and immersive virtual reality.

name: Latifur Khan
title: Professor
bio: IEEE Fellow. Research in big data analytics, data stream mining, social network analysis, and cyber security with machine learning.

name: Feng Chen
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in event detection, anomaly detection, and mining spatio-temporal data and social networks.

name: Tien Nguyen
title: Professor
bio: Research in software engineering, program analysis, AI-assisted code generation, and automated software repair.

name: Shiyi Wei
title: Associate Professor, Director of Software Engineering Programs
bio: Research in software security, program analysis, and language-based defenses against memory errors and code injection.

name: W. Eric Wong
title: Professor, Director of International Outreach
bio: Research in software testing, debugging, fault localization, and software reliability.

name: Varghese S. Jacob
title: Professor
bio: Research in IT management, decision support systems, and the strategic value of information systems in organizations.

name: Nanda Kumar
title: Professor
bio: Research in digital strategy, IT governance, enterprise systems, and managing IT in organizations.

name: Steven Haynes
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in enterprise systems, SAP implementation, and ERP adoption. Expert in SAP S/4 HANA platform.

name: William Hefley
title: Professor
bio: Research in IT consulting, service management, ITIL, and agile project management.

name: Tom Henderson
title: Professor of Instruction
bio: Cybersecurity practitioner and educator. Expertise in network security, digital forensics, and cyber risk management.

name: Jeffrey Hicks
title: Professor of Instruction
bio: Expertise in cloud computing, AWS architecture, and enterprise IT infrastructure. AWS certified instructor.

name: Surya N. Janakiraman
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in business intelligence, data warehousing, and analytics platforms. Expert in SAP analytics suite.

name: Vaidyanathan Jayaraman
title: Professor
bio: Research in supply chain management, enterprise systems, and digital supply chains. Expert in SAP-based supply chain solutions.

name: Sanjay Jain
title: Professor
bio: Research in data management, information systems design, and database technologies for business.

name: Abhijit Biswas
title: Professor
bio: Research in business analytics, customer analytics, and machine learning applications for marketing and CRM.

name: Huseyin Cavusoglu
title: Professor
bio: Research in cyber security economics, IT risk management, and the economics of information security.

name: Ganesh Janakiraman
title: Professor
bio: Research in business analytics, data-driven decision making, and the application of AI in operations and management.

name: Ashiq Ali
title: Professor, Caruth Chair
bio: Research in financial accounting, earnings quality, and the role of accounting information in financial markets.

name: Umit G. Gurun
title: Professor
bio: Research in empirical corporate finance, advertising, media, and financial markets. Studies the interplay between media coverage and financial decisions.

name: Zhonglan Dai
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in corporate finance, investment, and FinTech. Studies capital structure, M&A, and venture capital.

name: Richard Harrison
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in asset pricing, derivatives, and financial econometrics. Teaches mathematical and quantitative methods in finance.

name: Randall Guttery
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in real estate finance, mortgage markets, and macroeconomic factors affecting financial markets.

name: William M. Cready
title: Professor
bio: Research in financial markets regulation, information asymmetry, and the role of financial reporting in investment decisions.

name: Ningzhong Li
title: Professor
bio: Research in investments, portfolio theory, and empirical asset pricing. Known for research on hedge funds and active portfolio management.

name: Alain Bensoussan
title: Professor
bio: World-renowned applied mathematician. Research in stochastic control, mathematical finance, and dynamic programming.

name: Kyle Hyndman
title: Professor
bio: Research in quantitative risk management, insurance, and applied probability in financial markets.

name: Rafael Copat
title: Professor of Instruction
bio: Expertise in financial modeling, valuation, and financial technology. Teaches practical financial modeling using Excel and Python.

name: Jianqing Chen
title: Professor
bio: Research in platform economics, digital markets, AI strategy, and the economics of information systems.

name: Dorothée Honhon
title: Professor
bio: Research in operations management, supply chain analytics, and prescriptive analytics for retail and logistics.

name: Bin Hu
title: Professor
bio: Research in econometrics, time series analysis, and statistical methods for finance and business analytics.

name: Elena Katok
title: Professor
bio: Research in behavioral operations, experimental economics, and causal analytics. Expert in A/B testing and experimental design for business.

name: Dmitri Kuksov
title: Professor
bio: Research in marketing analytics, consumer behavior modeling, and predictive analytics for pricing and product strategy.

name: Seung-Hyun Lee
title: Professor
bio: Research in corporate governance, sustainability analytics, ESG investing, and corporate innovation.

name: Sanjay Jain
title: Professor
bio: Research in big data systems, Hadoop/Spark architectures, and database foundations for analytics.

name: Howard Dover
title: Clinical Professor
bio: Expertise in social media strategy, CRM with Salesforce, and digital marketing analytics.

name: Julie Haworth
title: Professor of Instruction
bio: Teaching-focused faculty. Courses in R and Python for business analytics. Known for hands-on data science instruction.

name: Moran Blueshtein
title: Associate Professor of Instruction
bio: Expertise in SAS analytics, modeling for business analytics, and applied machine learning for business applications.

name: Tiffany A. Bortz
title: Professor of Instruction
bio: Expertise in SAP Analytics Cloud, business intelligence tools, and data warehousing. SAP-certified instructor.

name: Swati Biswas
title: Professor
bio: Research in statistical genetics, Bayesian methods for genomic data analysis, and methods for genetic association studies.

name: Pankaj Choudhary
title: Professor
bio: Research in measurement error models, tolerance intervals, agreement analysis, and statistical methods for assessing agreement between measurement methods.

name: Sam Efromovich
title: Professor, Endowed Chair in Mathematical Sciences
bio: World-recognized expert in nonparametric and adaptive estimation. Research in nonparametric curve estimation, adaptive methods, sequential analysis, and survival analysis.

name: Yulia Gel
title: Professor
bio: Research in topological data analysis, network science, climate and environmental statistics, and machine learning for complex dependent data.

name: Min Chen
title: Professor
bio: Research in probability theory, stochastic processes, extreme value theory, and high-dimensional data analysis with applications in bioinformatics.

name: Susan Minkoff
title: Professor
bio: Research in numerical analysis, computational statistics, wave simulation, and scientific computing for data science applications.

name: Yan Cao
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in statistical machine learning, deep learning, and nonparametric Bayesian methods. Focus on uncertainty quantification and statistical theory for modern ML algorithms.

name: Liang Hong
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in actuarial science, credibility theory, dependent loss models, and risk measures. Expertise in applied probability and stochastic processes for insurance applications.

name: Anh Tran
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in high-dimensional statistics, functional data analysis, and semi-parametric regression. Applications in genomics and biomedical data.

name: John Zweck
title: Professor
bio: Research in applied mathematics, computational methods for statistics, Bayesian inference, and data science applications in engineering and science.

name: Li Zhang
title: Professor
bio: Research in computational biology, systems biology, and bioinformatics. Expert in machine learning methods for genomics and proteomics data, transcriptome analysis, and regulatory network modeling.

name: Michael Qiwei Zhang
title: Professor, Cecil H. Green Chair
bio: Pioneer in computational genomics and bioinformatics. Research in gene regulation, epigenomics, and computational tools for high-throughput sequencing data analysis.

name: Faruck Morcos
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in computational biology, protein evolution, and systems biology. Develops statistical physics methods for inferring protein structure and function from sequence data.

name: Zhenyu Xuan
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in computational genomics, epigenomics, and gene regulation. Expert in ChIP-seq, ATAC-seq, and multi-omics data integration.

name: Lawrence J. Reitzer
title: Professor
bio: Research in microbial physiology, nitrogen metabolism in bacteria, and the molecular mechanisms of pathogen survival in host environments.

name: Stephen Spiro
title: Professor
bio: Research in microbial molecular biology, gene regulation in response to nitric oxide and oxygen, and stress responses in bacteria.

name: Kelli Palmer
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in antimicrobial resistance, biofilm formation, and the molecular mechanisms of pathogenic bacteria including Enterococcus.

name: Nicole De Nisco
title: Assistant Professor
bio: Research in urinary tract infections, host-pathogen interactions, and microbial mechanisms of persistent infection.

name: Tae Hoon Kim
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in 3D genome organization, chromatin architecture, and epigenomic regulation using Hi-C and other chromosome conformation capture methods.

name: Darshan Sapkota
title: Assistant Professor
bio: Research in stem cell biology, brain development, and the molecular mechanisms underlying neurodevelopmental disorders.

name: Juan E. González
title: Professor
bio: Research in computational evolution, phylogenomics, and bioinformatics tools for population genetics. Director of the Bioinformatics and Computational Biology MS program.

name: Daniel A. Griffith
title: Regents Professor, Ashbel Smith Professor
bio: World-renowned spatial statistician. Research in spatial autocorrelation, spatial filtering, and computational spatial statistics.

name: Yongwan Chun
title: Professor
bio: Research in spatial statistics, spatial econometrics, geographic information science, and public health geography.

name: Denis J. Dean
title: Professor
bio: Research in remote sensing, geospatial intelligence, wildlife ecology, and applications of machine learning to satellite imagery.

name: Dohyeong Kim
title: Professor
bio: Research in environmental health, GIS and public health, spatial epidemiology, and machine learning for socioeconomic data.

name: Patrick T. Brandt
title: Professor
bio: Research in political economy, Bayesian time series models, quantitative text analysis, and conflict forecasting.

name: Kurt J. Beron
title: Associate Professor
bio: Research in spatial econometrics, environmental economics, and the economics of air quality policy.

name: Dohyeong Kim (EPPS/Econ)
title: Professor
bio: Also contributes to Economics MS program with courses in forecasting and microeconomic theory for applications.
